name: dynamic_routing_pipeline
description: Config-driven orchestrator that routes work to a sub-pipeline discovered at runtime. The __dynamic_processor__ task is a placeholder resolved by OpenLineage events.

tasks.name: validate_input
tasks.description: Validates input configuration and determines the processing mode.

tasks.name: __dynamic_processor__
tasks.description: Placeholder sub-pipeline resolved at runtime based on config-driven routing.

tasks.name: publish_results
tasks.description: Publishes processed results to downstream consumers.
